summary: Phase 2 CRM (Commission & Payout) testing complete. Backend: 41/41 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All dashboards load correctly with proper role-based access. Empty states displayed properly. UI uses smooth rounded boxes design.
passed_tests: Backend Auth: All 4 user roles login successfully (super_admin, manager, sales_user, rep)
GET /api/commissions - Admin gets all commissions (empty list)
GET /api/commissions/my-commissions - User can see their own commissions with summary
Sales user role-based filtering returns only own commissions
GET /api/payouts - Admin gets all payouts (empty list)
GET /api/payouts/my-payouts - User can see their own payouts with summary
Manager blocked from commission stats (admin only)
Empty state responses have valid format
Frontend: CRM Portal loads with sidebar navigation
Frontend: Commissions Dashboard shows stats cards (admin)
Frontend: Commissions Dashboard shows empty state correctly
Frontend: Payouts Dashboard shows stats cards (admin)
Frontend: Payouts Dashboard shows Export CSV button
Frontend: Payouts Dashboard shows Create Payout button
Frontend: Create Payout modal opens with user selection
Frontend: Sales user sidebar shows only: Overview, Leads, Commissions
Frontend: Payouts link hidden from sales_user (correct)
Frontend: Programs link hidden from sales_user (correct)
Frontend: Sales user sees 'Track your commission earnings' subtitle (not admin view)
Frontend: Stats cards hidden from sales_user (admin only)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper role-based access control implemented
Empty states handled correctly in both backend (returns empty arrays) and frontend (displays appropriate messages)
UI uses rounded-2xl for smooth rounded boxes as required
Font configuration correct: Montserrat for headings (font-heading), Inter for body (font-body)
seed_data_creation: No test data created - system is empty as expected. APIs return valid empty responses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Commission and Payout system fully tested. All APIs return correct responses including empty states. Role-based access working: admin can approve/reject, sales_user can only see own data. UI uses smooth rounded boxes (rounded-2xl), Montserrat headings, Inter body font. No commissions/payouts exist in database yet - system is ready but empty. Stripe and GoHighLevel remain MOCKED.

commission_apis.GET /api/commissions: Returns filtered list, role-based (admin sees all, user sees own)
commission_apis.GET /api/commissions/stats: Admin only - returns by_status, by_role, pending_approval_count
commission_apis.GET /api/commissions/:id: Returns specific commission with access control

payout_apis.GET /api/payouts: Returns filtered list with role-based access
payout_apis.POST /api/payouts: Admin only - creates payout batch for user

frontend_commissions_dashboard.stats_cards: 4 cards: Pending Approval, Approved, Ready for Payout, Total Paid Out
frontend_commissions_dashboard.filters: Status filter dropdown, Type filter dropdown (admin)
frontend_commissions_dashboard.empty_state: Shows 'No Commissions Found' with helpful message
frontend_commissions_dashboard.commission_list: Ready to display commissions when available

frontend_payouts_dashboard.stats_cards: 3 cards: Pending Payouts, Approved (Ready), Total Paid
frontend_payouts_dashboard.actions: Export CSV button, Create Payout button (admin)
frontend_payouts_dashboard.create_modal: Opens with user selection dropdown, shows payable amount
frontend_payouts_dashboard.empty_state: Shows 'No Payouts Found' with helpful message

role_based_access.super_admin: Full access - sees all nav items, stats, approve/reject buttons
role_based_access.manager: Sees Overview, Leads, Teams, Commissions - no Payouts, Programs
role_based_access.sales_user: Sees Overview, Leads, Commissions only - stats hidden, no approve actions
